contract.prdJustification: FR-AP01 (P0): Endpoint to create a new session record (POST /api/sessions).
FR-AP02 (P0): Endpoint to list sessions with pagination and optional filters (GET /api/sessions).
GET /api/health service readiness/liveness for deployment checks

classifications.reason: audience=admin — internal endpoint, frontend call coverage is not required

contract.prdJustification: BASELINE — implicit infrastructure for any authenticated backend (login/refresh/logout/me). Not enumerated in PRD prose but required for every user flow that hits a bearer-guarded route.
